title: My Production Ready Containerized 3 Tier on AWS
content: Architecture Overview 1. Design network architecture and create resources network 2. Design security groups architecture and create security groups 3. Create a database and subnet group 4. Create an Application Load Balancer 5. Create an ECS Cluster for backend 6. Deploy frontend application using S3 and CloudFront 7. Implement authenticate GitHub Action on AWS using OIDC Identity Provider 8. Implement GitHub Action CI/CD 9. Monitoring ECS Cluster using CloudWatch and trigger SNS

title: Deploy frontend application using S3 and CloudFront
